chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1056 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 01.02.2024 Mr. Farhan Ali Shaikh, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Mukesh Kumar G. Karara, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for respondents-Pakistan Railways. Mr. Ashfque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents-Pakistan Railways has filed a compliance report, and submits that application / representation of the petitioners has been considered in terms of order dated 17.12.2019 and regretted. In view of above, since this is a disposed of petition, office to consign it to record. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
